modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty recording a meeting in Microsoft Teams.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue with recording a meeting in Microsoft Teams. They are unsure of the steps required to successfully initiate the recording feature during a meeting. This problem is affecting their ability to capture important discussions and decisions made during the meeting.
short_description: Difficulty recording a meeting in Microsoft Teams.
description: The user is experiencing an issue with recording a meeting in Microsoft Teams. They are unsure of the steps required to successfully initiate the recording feature during a meeting. This problem is affecting their ability to capture important discussions and decisions made during the meeting.
